name: Riyadh
industries: Government programmes, sovereign-fund giga-projects, banking and telecom concentrate the Kingdom's project leadership demand in the capital.
intro: Riyadh is the control room of Vision 2030. Ministries, PIF portfolio companies and delivery authorities in the capital direct the Kingdom's giga-projects, and they staff their PMOs with certified professionals as a matter of policy — PMP appears in Riyadh job descriptions more often than in any other Gulf city. Agile credentials are following quickly as government digital services scale. Live online batches run year-round with sensible Riyadh timings — a full Saturday–Sunday weekend cohort plus a midweek Wednesday–Thursday option — so you train during comfortable local daytime hours; the schedule table below lists every upcoming date with its exact Riyadh start and finish. Instruction is in English, the cohort is international, and invoices work for employer sponsorship, including programmes funding Saudi nationals’ development. We then guide the exam application, provide mock exams, and answer doubts until you pass.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Riyadh?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM UK, which is 11:00 AM – 08:00 PM AST in Riyadh. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Riyadh?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Riyadh. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Saudi Arabia?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Saudi Arabia and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Riyadh sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Saudi Arabia accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Riyadh — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Riyadh: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
